# teams app user-auth sso update

Update an SSO connection's settings

## Usage

```
teams app user-auth sso update [appId] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--connection-name <name>` | SSO connection to update |
| `--scopes <scopes>` | [OPTIONAL] New scopes |
| `--new-connection-name <name>` | [OPTIONAL] Rename the connection |
| `--client-secret <secret>` | [OPTIONAL] Client secret (auto-generated if not provided) |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
